events.text: Goal! New Zealand 0, Belgium 1. Leandro Trossard (Belgium) right footed shot from very close range to the bottom right corner following a corner.
Substitution, New Zealand. Ben Old replaces Ryan Thomas.
Substitution, New Zealand. Jesse Randall replaces Sarpreet Singh.
Marko Stamenic (New Zealand) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Goal! New Zealand 0, Belgium 2. Leandro Trossard (Belgium) right footed shot from the centre of the box to the top left corner. Assisted by Hans Vanaken.
Elijah Just (New Zealand) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Substitution, Belgium. Matias Fernandez-Pardo replaces Jérémy Doku.
Substitution, New Zealand. Michael Boxall replaces Tim Payne.
Substitution, New Zealand. Callum McCowatt replaces Joe Bell.
Goal! New Zealand 0, Belgium 3. Kevin De Bruyne (Belgium) left footed shot from outside the box to the bottom right corner.
Substitution, Belgium. Alexis Saelemaekers replaces Leandro Trossard.
Substitution, Belgium. Amadou Onana replaces Kevin De Bruyne.
Substitution, New Zealand. Francis de Vries replaces Liberato Cacace.
Goal! New Zealand 1, Belgium 3. Elijah Just (New Zealand) left footed shot from the centre of the box to the high centre of the goal following a corner.
Substitution, Belgium. Romelu Lukaku replaces Charles De Ketelaere.
Substitution, Belgium. Nicolas Raskin replaces Youri Tielemans.
Goal! New Zealand 1, Belgium 4. Romelu Lukaku (Belgium) header from very close range to the centre of the goal. Assisted by Nicolas Raskin with a cross.
Goal! New Zealand 1, Belgium 5. Alexis Saelemaekers (Belgium) right footed shot from the centre of the box to the bottom left corner. Assisted by Romelu Lukaku following a fast break.
